snow-canvas.$description: Snow Canvas — Page background, primary surface. Inherited from Relate as the dominant neutral.

lavender-wash.$description: Lavender Wash — Soft accent band behind hero and feature sections.

midnight-ink.$description: Midnight Ink — Headings, hero text, and the Inverse Fill Button surface. Near-black with a cool violet cast.

graphite-body.$description: Graphite Body — Body copy AND the dark fill for Code Window Card components, reused rather than importing Modal's separate void-black/ground-iron surfaces.

slate-caption.$description: Slate Caption — Muted body text, nav labels, Outlined Ghost Link text.

ash-helper.$description: Ash Helper — Helper text, metadata, and code comments inside Code Window Cards.

stone-divider.$description: Stone Divider — Hairline borders, Section Dividers, card edges.

fog-surface.$description: Fog Surface — Input backgrounds, disabled states.

royal-signal.$description: Royal Signal — The single saturated accent in the merged system. Carries every job Relate's blue and Modal's lime used to carry separately: links, CTA outlines, eyebrow labels, code keywords, active status chips, hero highlight word.

azure-focus.$description: Azure Focus — Input focus ring glow. The one permitted second blue value, reserved strictly for functional focus states.

terminal-white.$description: Terminal White — Text/string color inside dark Code Window Cards. A cool off-white standing in for Modal's Phosphor White, never pure #ffffff.

inter.$description: The only UI/heading/body typeface in the merged system. Modal's Goga display face is retired to keep a single-family minimalist rule; Inter's 600 weight covers what Goga covered.

roboto-mono.$description: Reserved entirely for Code Window Card content and technical/numerical labels. Inherited from Relate — Modal's Fira Mono is retired since Roboto Mono already covered the same role.

caption.$description: Eyebrow labels, uppercase category tags, chip text.

body-sm.$description: Secondary body copy, metadata, nav links.

code.$description: Code Window Card body text — keywords in royal-signal, output in terminal-white, comments in ash-helper.

96.$description: Borrowed up from Modal's spacing scale — reserved for rare full-bleed hero moments; everything else stays in Relate's tighter compact range.

buttons.$description: Pill radius — the only button treatment in the merged system, inherited from Relate.

cards.$description: Inner/product cards. Relate and Modal already agreed on this value.

code-window.$description: Code Window Card radius — matches Relate's pipeline-card radius, tying Modal's dark component into the light system's geometry.

feature.$description: Feature Section Card — three-layer soft float.

glow.$description: Ambient blue glow behind hero band.

code-window.$description: Code Window Card intentionally has no shadow — depth comes from the hairline border alone, per Modal's rule.

card.$description: Surface level 2: Product UI cards, inputs.

ink.$description: Surface level 3: Inverse Fill Button, footer band — the system's other intentional dark surface besides the code panel.

code-panel.$description: Surface level 4: Code Window Card — the system's one deliberate dark 'window' component, replacing Modal's void-black/ground-iron/carbon-veil stack with a single reused token.

com.refero.extraction.mergeStrategy: Relate's light, single-accent, pill-radius minimalism as the base system; Modal's component vocabulary (Code Window Card, Eyebrow Label, Status Chip, blurred Nav Bar) re-skinned into Relate's palette rather than imported with its own green-on-black hues. Modal's second color (lime-pulse) is fully retired — royal-signal (#145aff) is the system's only accent.
